name: Hiran Devinda
raw_text: HIRAN DEVINDA IT Undergraduate Software Developer Agentic Ai DevOps Enthusiast +94 78 580 7002 hirandevinda8@gmail.com LinkedIn GitHub Helamba, Agalawatta, Sri Lanka Professional Summary Motivated IT undergraduate specializing in agentic AI systems, full-stack development, and cloud-native applica- tions. Experienced in building autonomous workflows, ML-powered decision systems, and scalable backend services using Python, FastAPI, and modern cloud platforms. Education University of Moratuwa Institute of Technology (ITUM) Expected Graduation National Diploma in Technology (Information Technology NDT) C.W.W. Kannangara Central College, Matugama 2021 G.C.E. Advanced Level (Physical Science) Mathematics (C), Physics (C), Chemistry (C) Technical Skills Programming Languages JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, SQL, HTML, CSS Frontend Next.js (App Router), React.js, Tailwind CSS Backend Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, REST APIs, GraphQL Cloud DevOps AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Linux, Nginx Databases Tools PostgreSQL (Supabase), MongoDB, Redis, Prisma ORM, NX Monorepo, Git AI ML NLP, Custom ML Models, AI Agents Projects FlexiTask Job Posting Automation Platform Recent Next.js, TypeScript, Python, GitHub Actions, Redis Developedafull-stackjobboardusingNext.jsAppRouterandSupabasewithsecureGoogleOAuthauthentication. Built a FastAPI-based microservice to automate job distribution workflows. Implemented Redis-backed background schedulers to publish job postings to Telegram channels in real time. Improved SEO visibility using JSON-LD schema for Google for Jobs and optimized performance via lazy loading. Cleverly Intelligent Review Analysis Fraud Detection Platform Academic Project Python, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis, ML, Gemini API Developed a hybrid fraud detection system using ML models and rule-based validation. Trained models to detect anomalous reviews, spam behavior, and manipulation attempts. Integrated Google Gemini API to classify agreement or disagreement in review comments. Used Redis for caching, Docker for deployment, and CI/CD for automation. ClaimSense AI-Powered Insurance SaaS Ongoing Python, FastAPI, GCP, AI/ML Developing a cloud-native SaaS platform for intelligent insurance claim processing. Applied NLP-driven machine learning models for fraud detection and smart claim routing. Deployed scalable and highly available infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform. Certifications Other Skills Photography Videography 3-year diploma at NPAS freelance photographer. Soft Skills Problem-solving, teamwork, adaptability, and effective communication. References Mrs. Uthpala Athukorala Mrs. D.A.S. Ruwanmini Head of Division of IT, ITUM Senior Lecturer, Dept. of IT, ITUM +94 77 266 6602 +94 77 855 8303 uthpalap@itum.mrt.ac.lk ruwanminis@itum.mrt.ac.lk 1
